name: LedgerCommitContractSnapshot
description: The exact public LEDGER request/result subset frozen by INGEST for each accepted candidate.
schema_def: FrozenLedgerRecordRequest {ledgerContractVersion, operationId: ledger.transaction.record, idempotencyKey, actor, input:{accountId, signedAmount canonical decimal string, currencyCode: ZAR, transactionDate, postingDate?, originalDescription, sourceReference, provenance:{kind: statement_import, reference}}}

LedgerRecordResult {transactionId, accountId, signedAmount, currencyCode, transactionDate, postingDate?, effectiveDate, originalDescription, sourceReference?, provenance, lifecycleStatus, recordedActor, recordedAt}

The request is created once at manifest freeze and persisted byte-for-byte. Commit and resume invoke the shared public operation executor. A success becomes terminal only after ledger.transaction.get returns the same immutable facts. No private LEDGER type or store handle crosses the boundary.
